name: Vocell Bus Co Bus Co
fmcsa_address: 171 Corporation Way, Medford, MA 02155 (legal); operates from 378 Commercial St, Malden, MA 02148
fmcsa_status: inactive (USDOT 30910 listed INACTIVE in SAFER; company still operating per public sources)
entity_status: active (Massachusetts; company operating, Goodman family owned)
registry_source: Massachusetts Secretary of the Commonwealth Corporations Division (corp.sec.state.ma.us); BBB profile
notes: USDOT 30910 / MC-95603 matches Vocell Bus Company Inc per third-party SAFER mirrors (bubba.ai), but the FMCSA SAFER live record returns 'INACTIVE' and SAFER keyword search no longer returns the legal name - suggests registration lapsed/replaced. Company self-reports 100+ school buses on website; SAFER snapshot historically shows 26 power units / 30 drivers (likely outdated). Business roots to 1910 (Billerica MA); MA corporate entity incorporated 1967-05-24. Input name 'Vocell Bus Co Bus Co' is a duplicated-suffix data artifact.

name: Nichols Bus Svc Inc
fmcsa_address: 1010 Portland Cobalt Rd, Portland, CT 06480 (operating); legal address 27 N Main St, East Hampton, CT 06424
fmcsa_status: unknown (no clear FMCSA SAFER record under this name in CT; likely intrastate-only registration via CT DOT rather than USDOT)
entity_status: active (operating; CT school bus contractor serving Andover, East Haddam, East Hampton, Marlborough, Portland)
registry_source: Connecticut Secretary of the State CONCORD business registry (business.ct.gov); School Bus Fleet article
notes: SAFER searches for 'NICHOLS BUS' across CT return only Pennsylvania (Fleetville PA, USDOT 348651) and unrelated entities; CT Nichols Bus Service Inc appears to operate purely intrastate and may not maintain an active USDOT. Company self-reports fleet of 103 school transportation vehicles; founded 1944 by Charlie Nichols at age 16; family-owned (Tewksbury family also linked per LinkedIn). Two CT phone numbers - East Hampton HQ (860-267-0057) and Portland yard (860-342-2217).

name: Belton Union Bus Ctr Inc
fmcsa_address: 429 Sidney Baker St, Kerrville, TX 78028 (input; address is the historic Kerrville Bus Company terminal, later Kerrville Police Department)
fmcsa_status: unknown / likely inactive or never separately registered
entity_status: unknown (no Texas SOS / Comptroller match found under 'Belton Union Bus Center')
registry_source: Texas Comptroller franchise tax search (no match); Texas SOS (no match); OpenCorporates (no match)
notes: No SAFER record matches 'Belton Union' or 'Belton Union Bus Center' in TX; no Texas Comptroller franchise filing located. The input address (429 Sidney Baker St, Kerrville) is the historic Kerrville Bus Company depot - Kerrville Bus Co. bought out the 'Union Bus company' Kerrville franchise after 1927 per historical sources, so 'Belton Union Bus Ctr' may be a corrupted/legacy DBA reference rather than an active stand-alone carrier. Kerrville Bus Company Inc (USDOT 136534) covers that lineage but its USDOT is INACTIVE; current operating entity is Coach USA / Kerrville Bus Company at 1430 E Houston St, San Antonio TX (not Kerrville). The 429 Sidney Baker building is now vacant/redevelopment. Likely defunct or mislabeled record.

notes: USDOT 2853347 matches 'FREEDOM2GO' (Beachwood, OH) - this is the carrier name on file at FMCSA. Legal entity per Ohio SOS is 'Freedom 2 Go Transportation Services Inc' (incorporated 2013-08-23, formerly an LLC). FMCSA SAFER shows only 3 power units and 3 drivers, classified intrastate non-HM with no for-hire interstate authority - operates primarily as a non-emergency medical transport / car-limo service with private school transportation contracts. Smaller than implied by 'school transportation' name; may be a niche operator (NEMT + small school contracts).

name: Dietrich's Of Mitchell Inc
carrier_operation: unknown (historically school bus contractor; intrastate SD)
fmcsa_address: 1321 E Havens Ave, Mitchell, SD 57301 (input; address now occupied by East Side Motors)
inc_date: unknown (sister entity 'Dietrich's of Jamestown Inc' incorporated 1986-03-06 in ND - 'Dietrich's of Mitchell' likely incorporated similarly in the early 2000s when SD operations began)
officers: Richard J Dietrich (likely registered agent, by analogy to Jamestown entity)
Don Enger (general manager during Mitchell contract per press)
registry_source: South Dakota Secretary of State business search (sosenterprise.sd.gov - no direct match retrievable); inferred from Dietrich Bus Service / Dietrich's of Jamestown Inc parallel ND entity
notes: No SAFER carrier records for any DIETRICH entity in SD (full SAFER 'DIETRICH' keyword list contains 60+ entries, none in SD). Mitchell Republic reporting confirms Dietrich Bus Service (HQ Valley City, ND) held the Mitchell SD school district contract for ~15 years until 2017 when Mitchell Board of Education awarded the contract to Foreman Bus Company (Miller, SD); 'Dietrich's of Mitchell Inc' was almost certainly the SD-domiciled subsidiary that held the contract and likely wound down after the 2017 contract loss. Parent/sister 'Dietrich's of Jamestown Inc' (ND #1979200) remains active under Richard J Dietrich. Address at 1321 E Havens Ave is now East Side Motors (a used car dealer), supporting inactive status.
